ocr.text: In the Q1 2024 report for L3Harris in the Aerospace & Defense sector, the Commercial Aircraft deliveries overview reveals
significant metrics regarding aircraft transactions. The A320 Family recorded a total of 10 units delivered, generating total
revenue of $120M in CAD. In contrast, the Boeing 737 category saw a higher volume with 15 units delivered. Cumulatively,
these figures indicate total deliveries of 25 units, resulting in total revenue of $300M CAD for the period. Moreover, the market
share achieved during this quarter stood at 15%. Looking forward, the forecast for Q2 anticipates an increase in activity,
projecting 35 units to be delivered with an expected total revenue of $400M CAD, which reflects a growth rate of 20%. This
comprehensive overview underscores the robust performance and optimistic outlook for L3Harris in the commercial aircraft
